message:
test(api): add edge-case coverage for flip, repeat, roll, any/all, and median

- flip: empty-dims noop, out-of-range dimension rejection
- repeat: rank-mismatch rejection, zero-factor produces empty tensor
- roll: large shift wraps via modulo, invalid dimension rejection
- any/all: vacuous truth semantics on empty tensors (any=false, all=true)
- median: empty-tensor fail-closed error, backward pass gradient routing
  through unique-value sorted median

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
